name: Edge: 4h to stockout + only alt has 10-day lead (switch + spot bridge)
rubric_notes: 4h to stockout — Rule 1 fires immediate_switch (stock_imminent + has_alt). BUT FarShore's 10-day lead can't physically arrive before stockout in 4h, OR before the GOLD deadline in 16h. The right system behavior: place the FarShore order AND engage spot market as a bridge for the 10-day gap. emergency_spot_buy is acceptable as a primary action in its own right (rule 1's prose says 'a viable alternative exists' but doesn't promise it can deliver in time). Severity CRITICAL via the <24h-stockout rule. Confidence MEDIUM because the switch-and-spot combo is a nuanced call — high confidence would suggest the Arbiter didn't recognize the timing problem with the alt's lead time.
